blocks.text: Two title races ignite: Real Madrid tonight, Arsenal cling on by three
Barcelona lead La Liga by 9 with 7 games left — Real Madrid need a flawless run and Barça to blink. Man City cut Arsenal's PL lead to 3 after Sunday's 2-1 win. Two titles up for grabs.
⚽ 19:00 — Valencia at Mallorca, relegation six-pointer at Son Moix; both clubs fighting the drop
🎮 Thu 17:00 — rain & 100 Thieves vs BIG, CCT Global Finals in Porto
